title: Surveillance of valley fever (coccidioidomycosis) - Canada.ca
content:
## Surveillance of valley fever (coccidioidomycosis)
Learn about valley fever surveillance.
- How many cases are there of valley fever around the world?
- For more information

## How many cases are there of valley fever around the world?
Nearly 130,000 valley fever cases were reported to Centers for Disease Control and Prevention from 1998 to 2012.
More than 17,000 cases were reported in the U.S. in 2012. More than 70% of these cases came from Arizona.

## For more information
- Centers for Disease Control and Prevention: Valley fever (coccidioidomycosis) statistics
